seoTitle: Markwell vs Marlo Merrican — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Markwell and Marlo Merrican. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Markwell vs Marlo Merrican: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Markwell and Marlo Merrican.
heading: Markwell vs Marlo Merrican — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Markwell, New South Wales and Marlo Merrican, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Markwell has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Marlo Merrican (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Markwell or Marlo Merrican safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Markwell has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Marlo Merrican scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Markwell scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Marlo Merrican scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Markwell or Marlo Merrican?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Markwell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
